name: NovaKur Theme for OpenCart 4
shortDescription: A modern, responsive OpenCart 4 theme with dark mode, clean layout, and full customization via the admin panel.
description: NovaKur is a professional OpenCart 4 theme designed for performance and aesthetics. It includes a responsive layout, dark mode variant, custom header/footer, and deep integration with the OpenCart 4 extension system. Easily installed as an OCMOD package — no core file edits required.
